overview: BizDash is a business analytics dashboard for tracking revenue, managing users, and monitoring daily business performance with real-time insights and trend visualizations.
features: Revenue KPI cards with 30-day sparkline trend charts
User directory with search, filters, and per-user detail pages
Business health metrics: churn rate, conversion rate, active users with period-over-period comparisons
Today's highlights: daily revenue, new signups, and activity feed
Global date range picker controlling all charts and metrics
Sidebar navigation with dark/light mode toggle
